title: pilogyne maysorensis
intro: Pilogyne maysorensis, also known as Mysore pilogyne, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is a shrub native to the Western Ghats in India, known for its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which have been found to possess antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, providing health benefits such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Pilogyne maysorensis is often used in traditional medicine and can be prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture.
